title: Flex Container
content:
### Flex Container

The **flex container** is the parent element with `display: flex`.

---

### Creating a Flex Container

```css
.parent {
  display: flex;        /* Block-level */
  display: inline-flex; /* Inline-level */
}
```

---

### Container Properties

| Property | Purpose | Values |
|----------|---------|--------|
| `flex-direction` | Main axis direction | `row` (default), `row-reverse`, `column`, `column-reverse` |
| `flex-wrap` | Multi-line behavior | `nowrap` (default), `wrap`, `wrap-reverse` |
| `justify-content` | Main axis alignment | `flex-start`, `flex-end`, `center`, `space-between`, `space-around`, `space-evenly` |
| `align-items` | Cross axis alignment | `stretch` (default), `flex-start`, `flex-end`, `center`, `baseline` |
| `align-content` | Multi-line cross axis | `flex-start`, `flex-end`, `center`, `space-between`, `space-around`, `stretch` |
| `gap` | Space between items | `gap: 10px`, `gap: 20px 10px` (row column) |

---

### Justify Content (Main Axis)

```css
justify-content: flex-start;    /* Start (default) */
justify-content: flex-end;      /* End */
justify-content: center;        /* Center */
justify-content: space-between; /* Even space between */
justify-content: space-around;  /* Space around each */
justify-content: space-evenly;  /* Equal space everywhere */
```

---

### Align Items (Cross Axis)

```css
align-items: stretch;     /* Fill height (default) */
align-items: flex-start;  /* Top */
align-items: flex-end;    /* Bottom */
align-items: center;      /* Middle */
align-items: baseline;    /* Text baseline */
```

---

### Gap

```css
.container {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 20px;       /* Both row and column gap */
  row-gap: 10px;   /* Row gap only */
  column-gap: 20px; /* Column gap only */
}
```

---

### Complete Example

```css
.nav {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  align-items: center;
  padding: 0 20px;
  gap: 15px;
}
```

> **Best Practice:** Always set `gap` for spacing between flex items instead of margins.
codeExample:
Item 1
Tall
Short
Item 4

Items are centered vertically (align-items: center) and spaced evenly (justify-content: space-around).

quiz.question: Which property distributes space between items on the main axis?
